page_content:
Formerly: EDPS679.

TLPL700 Theory and Research in Computer Education (3 Credits) Examination of the current research and theory in the instructional uses of computers, instructional tutoring systems, computer programing environments, computer-based laboratories and problem solving environments in educational settings.

Prerequisite: TLPL600, EDMS645, and TLPL691; or permission of EDUC- Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.
